evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Uses v2 endpoints (/checkout/v2/pay, OAuth via identity-manager), Authorization: O-Bearer token, and the UAT host — internally consistent with v2. However, v2 standard checkout primarily uses OAuth-bearer auth; combining X-VERIFY AND O-Bearer on /checkout/v2/pay mixes v1-style checksum with v2 auth, which may produce checksum errors at runtime. Docs unavailable, so applying long-tail handling: consistent versioning + claimed v2 — but the X-VERIFY-on-v2 conflation is a notable supporting-call inaccuracy.
evidence.executability: Python and JSX blocks parse; imports are present (re-imports base64 inside webhook handler is harmless). One issue: backend response shape passed to PhonePeCheckout.transact expects tokenUrl but code optimistically maps multiple field names — would require a small fix once real response shape is known. No sandbox-infeasible patterns (no ngrok/brew/sudo).
evidence.completeness: (a) credential acquisition described with portal reference; (b) pip and npm install in bash blocks; (c) env vars referenced in code (PHONEPE_CLIENT_ID, _SECRET, _MERCHANT_ID, _SALT_KEY, _SALT_INDEX, _ENV, WEBHOOK_USERNAME/PASSWORD) but no explicit .env template block listing them — extractor must infer from os.getenv calls; (d) backend code present; (e) frontend code present; (f) test commands are described in prose, not a runnable bash test block. Missing explicit .env template and Test bash command.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Multiple official developer.phonepe.com URLs cited inline next to relevant code sections (X-VERIFY, webhook, PayPage, UAT sandbox), all on the canonical domain. One Stack Overflow reference is supplemental.

rubric_notes: docs_unavailable=true; long-tail handling applied. Mixing X-VERIFY (v1 checksum style) with v2 OAuth bearer on /checkout/v2/pay is a likely accuracy issue but internally the playbook claims v2 consistently. No explicit .env template or single runnable test bash block — caps completeness below 5.
